innateAbility.name: Galvanized
innateAbility.description: Innately grants Storm Spirit permanent mana regeneration bonus over time in certain conditions.

abilities.name: Static Remnant
abilities.description: Creates an remnant of Raijin at his current location, and moves to the point-targeted position upon cast.The remnant grants vision within the radius for a period of time.

abilities.name: Electric Vortex
abilities.description: Pulls an enemy unit to Raijin's location.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.description: Raijin overloads and creates an electrical charge upon an ability cast.The next attack deals damage and applies a slow within attacked enemy unit's radius.

abilities.name: Ball Lightning
abilities.description: Charging across the battlefield until he depletes his mana or reaches his target.The damage increases linearly as Raijin travels, starting from the cast location.

talents.right: +20% Overload Move Speed Slow+20 Overload Attack Speed Slow
